title: Wood in stonecutter
description: Allows you to craft wooden items in a stonecutter
body:
# Wood in Stonecutter

wood in stonecutter is a datapack that allows you to craft wooden items in a stonecutter

**NOTE: On 1.21.3, 1.21.4, 1.21.6, 1.21.7, and 1.21.8 when you add the datapack during world creation the game may tell you that the datapack whas made for an older version of Minecraft. This datapack is compatible with the newer versions so you can ignore this warning.**

### with planks you can craft:
- buttons
- doors
- fences
- fence gates
- pressure plates
- signs
- slabs
- stairs
- trapdoors
- sticks

### with logs / stems(warped & crimson) / blocks(bamboo) you can craft:
- boats / rafts(bamboo) - warped & crimson don't have boats
- stripped logs / stems(warped & crimson) / blocks(bamboo)
- _wood blocks*_ / hyphae(warped & crimson) - bamboo doesnt have _wood blocks*_
- planks


### with stripped logs / stems(warped & crimson) / blocks(bamboo) you can craft:
- boats / rafts(bamboo) - warped & crimson don't have boats
- planks
- stripped _wood blocks*_ / hyphae(warped & crimson) - bamboo doesnt have _wood blocks*_
- shelves

### with _wood blocks*_ / hyphae(warped & crimson) you can craft:
- stripped _wood blocks*_ / hyphae(warped & crimson) - bamboo doesnt have _wood blocks*_

_**\* with "wood blocks" i mean the ones with bark on all six sides**_
